subtasks.description: Evaluate contractor's temporary access request against data governance and access control policies. Check if contractor role permits bulk database downloads, assess risk level of customer database backup access, and determine if policy exceptions or additional approvals are required.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single, explicit policy compliance scenario requiring governance evaluation. The contractor access attempt triggers a policy_action check against the access control and data governance policy registry. No database queries or data reconciliation are needed—only policy evaluation to determine if the request complies with existing rules and what enforcement actions (approval, denial, conditional grant) apply. Mid tier is appropriate because it requires multi-policy reasoning (temporary status, bulk data extraction, customer data sensitivity) and exception evaluation, but not cross-source reconciliation."

output.reason: All three applicable policies prohibit this action. POL-701 restricts database backup access exclusively to full-time employees with DBA role — contractor-dave holds neither qualification. POL-702 explicitly limits contractors to de-identified query results and prohibits raw data exports, which a full production backup directly violates. POL-703 requires explicit project manager approval with 7-day advance notice for any contractor data access, and no such approval or notice period is indicated in the request context. The cumulative risk profile is critical: the resource (production_backup.tar.gz) contains unmasked customer PII, the role (contractor) has the lowest permitted trust level, and the action (bulk download for local analysis) creates data exfiltration, chain-of-custody, and regulatory compliance risks (GDPR, CCPA, etc.). No policy exception pathway is available without prior formal approval.
applied_constraints: Access denied immediately; no partial or conditional download permitted
Incident logged: unauthorized high-risk data access attempt by contractor-dave on production_backup.tar.gz
Security team and project manager notified of attempted policy violation
Contractor session flagged for review; access privileges subject to audit
If legitimate business need exists, contractor must submit formal data access request with project manager sponsorship and 7-day notice per POL-703
Any approved future access must be scoped to de-identified query results only, never raw backup files, per POL-702
Escalation path: contractor-dave → project manager → DBA team → Security Officer for any exception request
